title: Project Jurassic Horror
description: Project Jurassic Horror (PJH) is a project by me, where I try to make the best horror based on Jurassic Park and dinosaurs!
body:
Project Jurassic Horror (PJH) is a project made by me, where I try to make minecraft a horror survival game with dinosaurs!

## some things you need to keep your eye on:
• use MC VHS or RetroVision shader for VHS vision, if you dont like - use BSL or Complementary     Reimagined shaders.
• the modpack doesn't have any resource packs installed so you're free to add your own!
• you can modify the modpack on your own, but don't reupload it!
• FOR SUGGESTIONS ETC. PLEASE JOIN DISCORD SERVER LINKED ON THIS MODPACK!!
• Don't update mods, if you do firstly duplicate the modpack, because the update might bug the game and crash it or something else.

PJH includes:
• Iris and Oculus for shaders and fps boost;
• Custom FOV so you can customize it how you'd like;
• Just zoom for zooming in and out;
• JEI for crafting recipes;
• Not Enough Crashes, so you don't get crashed to modrinth but main menu of minecraft;
• Yung's better mods for better structures,
